summary: Completed frontend testing of Multi-language Toggle and ZATCA API Integration features. All 11 requested features tested and verified working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Language toggle button visible in navigation bar - PASSED (data-testid='language-toggle-btn')
2. Clicking 'EN' switches UI to English (LTR layout) - PASSED (html lang='en' dir='ltr')
3. Clicking 'عربي' switches UI back to Arabic (RTL layout) - PASSED (html lang='ar' dir='rtl')
4. ZATCA Verification page accessible at /compliance/zatca-verify/ - PASSED
5. Scope warning banner displayed on ZATCA page - PASSED (amber banner with verification-only notice)
6. VAT number verification form works - PASSED (data-testid='vat-number-input', 'verify-vat-btn')
7. Valid VAT number (300000000000003) returns success - PASSED (Arabic success message displayed)
8. Invalid VAT number returns error with Arabic message - PASSED (client-side validation with pattern='3\d{13}3')
9. Invoice structure verification form exists - PASSED (data-testid='invoice-uuid-input', 'invoice-xml-input', 'verify-invoice-btn')
10. Verification results are logged in database - PASSED (Recent Verifications table shows entries)
11. Recent verifications table shows history - PASSED (3+ entries visible with Type, ID, Status, Score, Date columns)
seed_data_creation: Created 3 VAT verification logs during testing (300000000000003 x2, 311111111111113 x1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language toggle and ZATCA verification features fully tested. Language toggle switches between Arabic (RTL) and English (LTR) correctly. ZATCA page shows scope warning banner, VAT verification form, invoice structure verification form, and recent verifications history table. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing.

zatca_verification.scope: VERIFICATION ONLY - No submission, clearance, or signing

mocked_api_note: ZATCA API responses are SIMULATED (not calling live ZATCA servers). The verification logic validates VAT number format but returns success for any format-valid number. This is expected behavior for the verification-only mode.
